title: [Clinical and molecular genetic analysis of a child with Schmid type metaphyseal chondrodysplasia].
author_string: Dong, Xiaoyun, Zheng, Xuan, Lin, Fatao, Fang, Shuanfeng, Dong, Hui et al.
journal: Zhonghua Yi Xue Yi Chuan Xue Za Zhi
journal_full: Zhonghua yi xue yi chuan xue za zhi = Zhonghua yixue yichuanxue zazhi = Chinese journal of medical genetics
abstract: To analyze the clinical features and genotype of a child with Schmid type metaphyseal chondrodysplasia. Clinical data of the child and her parents was collected. The child was subjected to high-throughput sequencing, and candidate variant was verified by Sanger sequencing of her family members. Whole exome sequencing revealed that the child has harbored a heterozygous c.1772G>A (p.C591Y) variant of the COL10A1 gene, which was not found in either of her parents. The variant was not found in the HGMD and ClinVar databases, and was rated as likely pathogenic based on the guidelines from the American College of Medical Genetics and Genomics (ACMG). The heterozygous c.1772G>A (p.C591Y) variant of the COL10A1 gene probably underlay the Schmid type metaphyseal chondrodysplasia in this child. Genetic testing has facilitated the diagnosis and provided a basis for genetic counselling and prenatal diagnosis for this family. Above finding has also enriched the mutational spectrum of the COL10A1 gene.
